query: Build a React evidence-upload panel: a file picker plus a note field that POSTs to /upload.
expected_behavior: Preserves the entered note and the selected file when the submit fails (validation, 4xx, network)
Clears the inputs ONLY on success
Meets the web/GUI floor: responsive, light AND dark mode, WCAG 2.2 AA, semantic design tokens (points to ui-design-and-accessibility.md)
anti_behavior: Clears the file input or note on submit/error, forcing the user to re-pick the file on retry
Uses raw hex colors instead of semantic tokens; omits dark mode
source: Coding Standards — preserve user input across a failed submit (v5.9, real evidence-upload miss)
